task: I found a small wallet near the playground and I want to make sure I handle it the right way. Can you help me think through the best next steps and what to do if there’s no obvious name inside?

turns.agent_response:
Yes — the best next step is to **keep it closed and turn it in to a teacher or the school office right away**.

If there’s **no obvious name inside**, that’s still okay:
- **Don’t take any money or cards out**
- **Don’t keep it to “look for a name”**
- Give it to the office/teacher so they can check if it belongs to someone

If you want, you can say:
> “I found this wallet near the playground and wanted to turn it in.”

That’s the safest and fairest thing to do.

user_simulator.text: Yeah, that sounds right. Keep it closed and turn it in to the teacher or office. Don’t open the money part or take anything out. If there’s no name, they can still figure it out better than I can. I’d probably say, “I found this wallet near the playground and wanted to turn it in.”
